lesson.menu_desc: Present Simple for Real Routines & Frequency Adverbs — 30 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 2 — Talking About Your Everyday Life — Present Simple for Real Routines
lesson.title_tag: Professor View — Vanessa Giuriati | Aula 2 — Talking About Your Everyday Life

listenings.text: Hi, let me tell you about my typical Monday. I always wake up at six. I get ready quickly, and I have breakfast with my wife. I usually commute by car, and I start work at eight. In the morning, I check emails and I have two or three meetings. I often have lunch at my desk, which is not a great habit. In the evening, I sometimes work out, but honestly, I rarely go to the gym on Mondays. I cook dinner, I relax for an hour, and I never go to bed after eleven. That is a normal Monday for me.

My weekends are very different from my weekdays. On weekdays, I always wake up early and I rush. But on weekends, I never set an alarm. I usually wake up slowly, and I make a big breakfast. I often go for a walk in the morning. In the afternoon, I sometimes meet a friend for coffee, or I just stay home and read. I rarely work on the weekend, because I really need to rest. In the evening, I cook something special and I relax. I feel calm and happy. That is how I recharge for the week.

extra_audio.text: First, I wake up and I get ready. Second, I have breakfast. Third, I commute and I start work. Fourth, I check emails and I have meetings. Fifth, I finish work, I cook, and I relax.
